Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/missingLayerContext_preview.ts(10,14): warning TS377034: Missing 'A' in the expected Layer context. effect(missingLayerContext)


==== /.src/missingLayerContext_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics missingLayerContext:warning
    import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"
    
    class A extends Context.Service<A>()("A", { make: Effect.succeed({}) }) {
      static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
    }
    declare const layer: Layer.Layer<A, never, A>
    // @ts-expect-error
    export const preview: Layer.Layer<A> = layer
                 ~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377034: Missing 'A' in the expected Layer context. effect(missingLayerContext)
